channel.title: Comments on: 5 Seasons Brewery – Atlanta, Georgia
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Marco Baio
item.dc:creator: Marco Baio
item.description: Sounds fine here. Thanks for another great episode!
item.content:encoded: Sounds fine here. Thanks for another great episode!

item.title: By: John's mom
item.dc:creator: John's mom
item.description: this is a very interesting episode...maybe it is my computer but I couldn't hear it very well I had my sound turned up???? kp
item.content:encoded: this is a very interesting episode…maybe it is my computer but I couldn’t hear it very well I had my sound turned up???? kp
